task:visual_key_best_practices.label: Task: visual keys best practices
task:visual_key_best_practices.detail: Use short stable visual keys on every node: site logo placeholders for site work, form/screenshot placeholders for web forms, QA symbols for tests, agent badges for delegated branches. Replace placeholders with latest safe visual artifacts when available.

task:development_flow_architect.label: Task: development flow architect

task:cognitive_load_slider.label: Task: cognitive load slider
